title: neoalsomitra philippinensis
intro: Neoalsomitra philippinensis, also known as the Philippine trientaphyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cercidophyllaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Neoalsomitra philippinensis are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health ailments and promote overall well-being.
